title: Most Americans Now Say U.S. Foreign Policy Ignores the Interests of Other Countries
summary_en: Partisans hold different views on whether the U.S. contributes to peace, considers other countries’ interests and garners respect around the world.
title_cn: 皮尤研究中心报告显示多数美国民众认为美国外交政策无视他国利益

title: What the data says about gun deaths in the U.S.
summary_en: The number of gun deaths in the U.S. fell for the third consecutive year in 2024 but remained among the highest annual totals on record.
title_cn: 皮尤研究中心发布美国枪支死亡问题相关数据分析结果
